DS3231_CONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create DS3231 RTC instance on specified I2C bus
DS3231_READ_FIELD_TOOLTIP: Read current date and time from the RTC as a DateTime object
DS3231_UNPACK_TIME_TOOLTIP: Get a specific field from a DateTime value
DS3231_CREATE_DATETIME_MESSAGE0:
create DateTime
Y $[YEAR] M $[MONTH] D $[DATE] W $[DAY]
H $[HOURS] M $[MINUTES] S $[SECONDS]
DS3231_CREATE_DATETIME_TOOLTIP: Create a DateTime object with the specified date and time values
DS3231_SET_TIME_TOOLTIP: Set date and time on the RTC
DS3231_READ_TEMPERATURE_TOOLTIP: Read RTC internal temperature in degrees Celsius
